evals.description: Pattern numbering sequential (no gaps, no reordering)
evals.question: Are all patterns numbered in strict ascending order?
evals.pass_criteria: Pattern 1, 2, 3, ..., N with no gaps or reordering
evals.fail_criteria: Any numbering gap, skip, or out-of-order pattern
evals.notes: Baseline had order 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,10,9. Fixed to 1-10 sequential.

evals.description: Core patterns (install, hook, plan review) within first 200 lines
evals.question: Can an agent find install + hook setup + plan review within 200 lines?
evals.pass_criteria: All three core patterns appear before line 200
evals.fail_criteria: Any core pattern appears after line 200
evals.notes: Already passing at baseline. Preserved through all mutations.

evals.question: Is the Obsidian/Bear notes section under 80 lines?
evals.notes: Baseline Pattern 9 was ~170 lines (386-555). Condensed to ~55 lines by merging Obsidian+Bear+ManualSave, removing folder organization details and redundant bash checks.

evals.question: Are troubleshooting tips placed near their related patterns?
evals.pass_criteria: Each troubleshooting tip is within 20 lines of its related pattern
evals.fail_criteria: Troubleshooting is in a separate section far from related patterns
evals.notes: Baseline had a separate Troubleshooting section at lines 513-551. Moved all tips inline as '> **Tip:**' callouts within their related patterns.

evals.description: Do-not-use section present with at least 2 criteria
evals.question: Does the skill have a 'Do not use' or 'When not to use' section?
evals.pass_criteria: Section exists with at least 2 exclusion criteria
evals.notes: Added '## Do not use this skill when' section with 3 exclusion criteria after 'When to use this skill'.

evals.question: Is the skill under 450 lines total?
evals.notes: Baseline was 577 lines. Final is 278 lines (52% reduction). Achieved by: condensing Obsidian section, removing verbose 'What it does:' lists, merging duplicate python3 JSON examples into single Tip callouts, removing folder organization detail.

mutations.name: Fix pattern numbering
mutations.description: Reorder patterns to strict sequential 1-10. OpenCode Setup promoted from prose section to Pattern 9. Manual Save merged into Pattern 10.

mutations.name: Add Do-not-use section
mutations.description: Added '## Do not use this skill when' with 3 exclusion criteria after 'When to use this skill'.

mutations.name: Condense Obsidian/Bear section
mutations.description: Merged Pattern 9 (Obsidian) + Pattern 10 (Manual Save) + Bear Notes into single ~55 line Pattern 10. Removed folder organization details, redundant bash detection commands.

mutations.name: Inline troubleshooting
mutations.description: Moved each troubleshooting item to a '> **Tip:**' callout within its related pattern. Removed standalone Troubleshooting section.

mutations.name: Trim overall length
mutations.description: Removed verbose 'What it does:' lists, condensed Gemini/Codex patterns (single shared python3 tip reference), removed duplicate examples, removed verbose Remote section description.
